mapper.insert: insert into ledger_event_outbox ( outbox_id, event_type, owner_user_id, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, published_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{outboxId}, #{eventType}, #{ownerUserId}, #{exchangeName}, #{routingKey}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{publishedAt}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select outbox_id, event_type, owner_user_id, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, published_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at from ledger_event_outbox where status in ('PENDING', 'RETRY') and next_retry_at <= #{now} order by created_at asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update ledger_event_outbox set status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = now(), last_error = null where outbox_id = #{outboxId}
update ledger_event_outbox set status = 'RETRY', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = now() where outbox_id = #{outboxId}
